Music and Computers

Release Notes

February 4, 2004

  • "2.6 Noisy Copy of a Melody" - worked around bug in Apple Java that caused melodies to not be drawn in the boxes.
  • New "classes/drumbox.jar" file which has 2 melodic instruments, more drum types, stochastic note triggers, etc.

Added these Applets which need to be installed:

  • 3.3 Build a Sawtooth using Sine Waves - Note that the original spec called for a triangle wave but it was not as compelling as the sawtooth wave. A triangle wave sounds too much like a sine wave.
  • 5.3 Using ITD to Locate a Sound - Caption should be modified to say "This Applet uses Interaural Time Delay to simulate sound localization (requires headphones)."

February 3, 2004

Added these Applets which need to be installed:

  • 4.1 Noise "Bring in da funk" (from October '03)
  • 4.4 Voice Formant synthesis
  • 4.8 Granular Synthesis
  • 4.9 Plucked String using Karplus Strong
  • 5.1 MultiTap Delay (from October '03)

Eliminated scope controls from a few Applets so they draw better on Mac OS X and so they are more clear. Applets include:

  • 1.3 Hear Frequency
  • 4.5 Low Frequency Modulation
  • 4.3 Filter Fun

Applet tag height may need to be adjusted.
